pattern: Decompose a number into two positive parts, each of whose decimal digits are all nonzero.
hints: Iterate a from 1 upward; b = n - a. Stop as soon as both contain no zero digit.
Check each candidate with a helper that converts the number to a string and scans for '0'.
The problem guarantees a solution exists, so a linear scan always terminates before n.

edge_inputs.description: n=11 which has an obvious split
n=10 requires non-trivial split since 1+9=10 works
n=100 must avoid zero digits in both parts
n=1000 larger value with many zero-containing candidates

stress.description: Random n values in full range
